data.title: Senator Lummis raised concern over reports of the US selling off 80% of its Bitcoin reserves, leaving just around 29,000 coins.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, a strong supporter of cryptocurrency, expressed concern over reports indicating a significant decrease in the amount of Bitcoin held by the U.S. Government. It is reported that over 80% of the Bitcoin reserves have been sold off, leaving just approximately 29,000 coins. Lummis criticized this move, calling it a strategic mistake that sets the U.S. back in the Bitcoin race. The information was revealed in a government document obtained through a Freedom of Information Act request by journalist L0la L33tz. The document disclosed that the U.S. Marshals Service, a branch of the Department of Justice, currently holds $28,988.35 BTC.

data.title: Cango Inc. announced all resolutions passed at Second Extraordinary General Meeting on July 17, 2025.
data.description: Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) declared that all proposals presented at its Second Extraordinary General Meeting on July 17, 2025, were successfully approved by the shareholders. The meeting took place in Hong Kong on that date.

data.title: Snap-on reports Q2 2025 results: Sales $1.18B, diluted EPS $4.72. Business Wire.
data.description: Snap-on has released its second quarter 2025 financial results from Kenosha, Wisconsin. The company reported sales of $1.1794 billion and diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $4.72 in the quarter.

data.title: Riot Platforms reduces stake in Bitfarms to 9.85% after selling 2.4M+ shares. Company confirms stake decrease.
data.description: Riot Platforms has disclosed reducing its stake in Bitfarms Ltd. to 9.85% by selling more than 2.4 million shares. The move comes as part of Riot Platforms' strategy to adjust its investment portfolio.

data.title: Steel Rebar Market projected to reach $268.4 billion by 2030, as per MarketsandMarkets report. Delray Beach, July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released discussing the Steel Rebar Market. The report covers various aspects including Types (Deformed, Mild), Processes (BOS, EAF), Coating Types (Plain, Galvanized, Epoxy Coated), Bar Sizes (#3, #4, #5, #8), End-use Industries (Infrastructure, Housing & Industrial), and regions worldwide. This report provides a global forecast for the steel rebar market.

data.title: Vertiv acquires Custom Rack Solutions, enhancing high-density infrastructure. Deal announced on July 17, 2025.
data.description: Vertiv, a leading provider of critical digital infrastructure solutions, has recently revealed a strategic move to acquire Great in a bid to enhance its position in high-density integrated infrastructure offerings. This acquisition, announced on July 17, 2025, is set to bolster Vertiv's leadership in the industry. With Vertiv's stock listed under NYSE as VRT, this agreement marks a significant development in the company's growth strategy. The deal indicates a notable advancement in Vertiv's journey towards expanding its portfolio to meet the evolving needs of the digital infrastructure market.

data.title: Orano Canada and Denison Mines begin uranium production at McClean Lake, as joint-venture partners in MLJV.
data.description: Saskatoon, Saskatchewan - July 17, 2025 - In a joint effort, Orano Canada Inc. and Denison Mines Corp. have officially commenced uranium mining at the McClean Lake Joint Venture. The partners, trading under the symbols TSX: DML and NYSE American: DNN, expressed their satisfaction with the progress.

data.title: Teneo acquired PwC's Australia business restructuring services unit, adding 80 professionals, expanding into Asia-Pacific.
data.description: Teneo has recently introduced its Financial Advisory business in Australia by welcoming around 80 professionals to the team. This new operation is set to become a significant center for further expansion throughout the Asia-Pacific area. The financial advisory services offered will enhance the existing strategic services provided by Teneo.
